_README: Sources the ingestion pipeline MAY read. Everything is DISABLED by default on purpose. Before setting enabled:true for any source, confirm you are allowed to use it (see COMPLIANCE.md): check the site's Terms, robots.txt, and feed/API license. The pipeline only ever stores a link + your own short summary draft — it never republishes source text. Pickleball video/highlights are never re-hosted; treat them as links + your own recaps.

sources.label: Example Federation — announcements
sources.permission: UNVERIFIED — confirm feed is offered for syndication; link-only + own-words summary

sources.label: Example Paddle Maker — product news
sources.permission: UNVERIFIED — facts/specs only, verify against official product page
